java.lang.Object

    • saveOnlyAttributes

      public Portfolio saveOnlyAttributes(Portfolio portfolio, Portfolio existingEntity, Set<Class<? extends Annotation>> updatePropertyLevelClasses) throws Exception
      Description copied from interface: BaseRepositoryCustom
      Saves only specific attributes of an entity based on property-level update permissions. Uses annotation-based access control to determine which fields can be modified by the current user.
      Specified by:
      saveOnlyAttributes in interface BaseRepositoryCustom<Portfolio>
      Parameters:
      portfolio - the entity containing the new values to be saved
      existingEntity - the current entity from the database, null for new entities
      updatePropertyLevelClasses - set of annotation classes that define update permission levels
      Returns:
      the saved entity with updated attributes
      Throws:
      Exception - if the save operation fails, validation errors occur, or security constraints are violated

    • delEntityWithTenant

      public int delEntityWithTenant(Integer id, Integer idTenant)
      Specified by:
      delEntityWithTenant in interface PortfolioJpaRepositoryCustom

    • createNotExistingCurrencypairs

      @Transactional public Integer createNotExistingCurrencypairs(Integer idPortfolio)
      Description copied from interface: PortfolioJpaRepositoryCustom
      If the currency of a portfolio has been changed, currency pairs may have to be created according to the transactions of this portfolio and bank accounts.
      Specified by:
      createNotExistingCurrencypairs in interface PortfolioJpaRepositoryCustom
      Parameters:
      idPortfolio - ID des portfolios
      Returns:
      ID of tenant
